title: Import Board to Excel
excerpt: Hello can we have a feature that when we import our board to excel have an option to remove powered by monday logo in the excel file?

posts.author: argyll (argyll)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello can we have a feature that when we import our board to excel have an option to remove powered by monday logo in the excel file?

posts.author: Amanda115 (Amanda)
posts.cookedHtml: When in the board view, click the 3 dots in the top right of the screen, choose more actions, then Export board to Excel. Once in Excel document, there will be no Monday.com marketing or signatures on the document.
